title: I Don'T Wanna
lyrics:
[opening]
*Clink!* Plate down
Mama’s frown

[verse 1]
Beans too green
Look mean
Bear would eat ‘em
I won’t—neat ‘em!

[parent]
Why?

[chorus]
I don’t wanna!
I don’t wanna!
Don’t wanna eat this green
Yuckiest I’ve seen!

[verse 2]
Bean’s a boat
Float away
Fish don’t eat green
Fish eat cake!

*Plop!*

[parent]
Why?

[chorus]
I don’t wanna!
I don’t wanna!
Don’t wanna eat this green
Yuckiest I’ve seen!

[verse 3]
Bean’s a bug
*Eww!* *Eww!*
Toss it—*whoosh!*
Bin—*boom!*

*Whoosh!* *Boom!*

[parent]
Why?

[chorus]
I don’t wanna—
I don’t wanna—
...One teeny bean?
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, xylophone and tambourine, 118 BPM, strong bass, punchy beat, bouncy groovy infectious singalong, impossible to sit still, makes you move
scene: The kitchen clock reads 6:15 p.m., and you’ve just set a plate of steaming green beans on the high-chair tray—*clink*—as your toddler’s face scrunches, tiny fists balling up. "I don’t wanna!" erupts before the first bean even touches their lips.
cover_description: Toddler’s fist hovers over plate, bean wobbling on the edge.
rhyme_family: wanna, gonna, banana, bandana, tuna, moona (as in "to the moona!"), funner, runner, sunner (as in "sooner"), dunner (as in "dumber"), stunner, mama, drama, comma, suma (as in "some-a"), buna (as in "bunny"), huna (as in "honey")
